testcase.name: test_serve_file_returns_image_200

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' + where 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' = get('Cache-Control', '') + where get = {'Date': 'Fri, 26 Jun 2026 02:11:26 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'image/png', 'Content-Length': '282', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a118ae6a6ba33426-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=HymfrScge57HVGqi3vEyEJ8FQExUjN65htIDL8qq9hE-1782439886.4702225-1.0.1.1-mGFCk5VhrIKI17_TnEz.ZRM7UvPpB02kP8YO4giMFDBMpu7Fg0m2H4Wudiyk0etAPZt_PGNdbI0DHtKQmQddpmjj_f3au5A5YtIxcXbC_Mi8QQqX.fHP_BIFFFcU.rN.; HttpOnly; SameSite=None; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Fri, 26 Jun 2026 02:41:26 GMT', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow'}.get + where {'Date': 'Fri, 26 Jun 2026 02:11:26 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'image/png', 'Content-Length': '282', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a118ae6a6ba33426-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=HymfrScge57HVGqi3vEyEJ8FQExUjN65htIDL8qq9hE-1782439886.4702225-1.0.1.1-mGFCk5VhrIKI17_TnEz.ZRM7UvPpB02kP8YO4giMFDBMpu7Fg0m2H4Wudiyk0etAPZt_PGNdbI0DHtKQmQddpmjj_f3au5A5YtIxcXbC_Mi8QQqX.fHP_BIFFFcU.rN.; HttpOnly; SameSite=None; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Fri, 26 Jun 2026 02:41:26 GMT', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow'} = <Response [200]>.headers

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_file_serving.py:49: in test_serve_file_returns_image_200 assert "max-age" in r.headers.get("Cache-Control", "") E AssertionError: assert 'max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E + where 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' = get('Cache-Control', '') E + where get = {'Date': 'Fri, 26 Jun 2026 02:11:26 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'image/png', 'Content-Length': '282', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a118ae6a6ba33426-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=HymfrScge57HVGqi3vEyEJ8FQExUjN65htIDL8qq9hE-1782439886.4702225-1.0.1.1-mGFCk5VhrIKI17_TnEz.ZRM7UvPpB02kP8YO4giMFDBMpu7Fg0m2H4Wudiyk0etAPZt_PGNdbI0DHtKQmQddpmjj_f3au5A5YtIxcXbC_Mi8QQqX.fHP_BIFFFcU.rN.; HttpOnly; SameSite=None; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Fri, 26 Jun 2026 02:41:26 GMT', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow'}.get E + where {'Date': 'Fri, 26 Jun 2026 02:11:26 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'image/png', 'Content-Length': '282', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a118ae6a6ba33426-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=HymfrScge57HVGqi3vEyEJ8FQExUjN65htIDL8qq9hE-1782439886.4702225-1.0.1.1-mGFCk5VhrIKI17_TnEz.ZRM7UvPpB02kP8YO4giMFDBMpu7Fg0m2H4Wudiyk0etAPZt_PGNdbI0DHtKQmQddpmjj_f3au5A5YtIxcXbC_Mi8QQqX.fHP_BIFFFcU.rN.; HttpOnly; SameSite=None; Secure; Path=/; Domain=preview.emergentagent.com; Expires=Fri, 26 Jun 2026 02:41:26 GMT', 'X-Robots-Tag': 'noindex, nofollow'} = <Response [200]>.headers
